mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (msg_id, user_id, title, content, type, priority, read_status, read_at, link_url, meta, created_at, expire_at) VALUES (#{msgId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{readStatus}, #{readAt}, #{linkUrl}, #{meta}, #{createdAt}, #{expireAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_status = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0
